sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n104124" key="tlhpa/qeia" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τληπάθ-εια</orth> [<foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">πᾰ], <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n104124.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">patience, endurance</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:1:3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.3</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2571.tlg001:11p.442M" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Hierocl.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in CA</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11p.442M.</biblScope> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
